message:
feat(import): add content parser and block classifiers for prompt analysis

Implements a new import module for parsing unstructured prompts and documents
into classified content blocks. This enables automatic conversion of system
prompts and documentation into structured SkillSpec sections.

- ContentBlockType enum (Rule, Example, Pitfall, Checklist, Context, Metadata)
- ContentBlock struct with confidence scores and classification signals
- Six heuristic classifiers: Rule, Example, Pitfall, Checklist, Context, Metadata
- ContentParser orchestration with block splitting (preserves code fences)
- SourceSpan tracking for original text locations
- ParseStats for debugging and analysis
- 28 unit tests for all classifiers and parser functionality

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
